creator: joerg@FreeBSD.org
text:
The pkg-descr file in french/fr-med uses Latin-1 rather than UTF-8.

Since UTF-8 locales are the commonly agreed standard these days, "pkg info fr-med" looks quite strange. As that port is also used outside the French community (FreeCAD relies on it), it would be nice to convert that file to UTF-8. (For that same reason, adding an English translation would be appreciated as well, but I could live with a French text if displayed correctly.)
